description:

The Software Engineer works to understand and influence software architecture, while contributing to Citi’s and GFT’s technical user base.

**Required Qualifications**

* Clear understanding of Data Structures and Object Oriented Principles using
* Java

**Preferred Qualifications**
* Exposure to architecture experience in building horizontally scalable, highly
* available, highly resilient, and low latency applications.
* Exposure to API Management tools
* Exposure to Infrastructure as Code tools (i.e., Terraform, Cloudformation etc

description:
**Role Description** 




  





 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site Junior Software Engineer (MERN, AI, SAAS, Hubspot) role located in Bengaluru. Collaboration with cross\\-functional teams for seamless integration and ensuring robust back\\-end functionality will also be integral to this role.

 Develop, customize, and maintain SAAS and AI Products.

 Assist in building and maintaining web applications using the MERN stack for our clients and internal tools.
* **The "Future":**

 .

 and version control.

**Who You Are:**

title: Data Software Engineer Sr. Staff
description:
**Overview**
**Who We Are:** 
  

  

 Ever wonder who brings the entertainment to your flights? Panasonic Avionics Corporation is \\#1 in the industry for delivering inflight products such as movies, games, WiFi, and now Bluetooth headphone connectivity!
   

  

 How exciting would it be to be a part of the innovation that goes into creating technology that delights millions of people in an industry that’s here to stay! With our company’s history spanning over 40 years, you will have stability, career growth opportunities, and will work with the brightest minds in the industry. And we are committed to a diverse and inclusive culture that will help our organization thrive! We seek diversity in many areas such as background, culture, gender, ways of thinking, skills and more.
   

  

 If you want to learn more about us visit us at www.panasonic.aero. And for a full listing of open job opportunities go to www.panasonic.aero/join\\-us/.
   

  

  

  

**The Position:**
 As a Senior Staff Software Engineer, you will collaborate closely with the data engineering team and work on developing and maintaining distributed data infrastructure, ETL/ELT pipelines, data applications, and integration solutions. You will get a chance to work with brilliant minds in the industry, work on complex use cases enabling steep learning curve, and build products from scratch while modernizing various applications.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, build, and maintain event\\-driven distributed data infrastructure and data applications.
* Develop and optimize robust ETL/ELT pipelines to support batch and real\\-time data workflows.
* Integrate and normalize diverse data sources, ensuring high standards of data quality, accuracy, and consistency.
* Lead the design and implementation of real\\-time data processing systems for analytics, operational intelligence, and reporting use cases.
* Collaborate cross\\-functionally with data scientists, ML engineers, and product teams to design end\\-to\\-end data solutions.
* Establish best practices for data engineering, including testing, monitoring, deployment automation, and observability.
* Mentor engineers and contribute to architectural decisions, technical strategy, and roadmap planning for the data platform.


**Qualifications**
* 10–16 years of proven experience in software engineering, with a focus on data infrastructure and engineering.
* Expertise in object\\-oriented programming, design patterns, algorithm optimization, and problem\\-solving from first principles.
* Strong experience working with unstructured log data, real\\-time data processing, distributed computing frameworks, and streaming data frameworks.
* Proficient in Python; experience with Java or Scala is a plus.
* Deep expertise in data engineering technologies, including ETL/ELT pipelines, data integration, and operational monitoring.
* Experience drafting proofs of concept (POCs) and collaborating cross\\-functionally to develop prototypes and production\\-ready solutions.
* Proficiency with AWS services (Lake, Glue, EMR) and Airflow


 REQ\\-153215

title: Technology Platform Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Technology Platform Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Creates production and non\\-production cloud environments using the proper software tools such as a platform for a project or product. Deploys the automation pipeline and automates environment creation and configuration.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Storage Area Networks (SAN) Architecture and Design
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Technology Platform Engineer, a typical day involves designing and setting up both production and non\\-production cloud environments tailored to project or product needs. This role includes deploying automation pipelines to streamline the creation and configuration of these environments, ensuring seamless integration and operational efficiency. The position requires continuous collaboration with various teams to maintain and enhance the platform's stability and performance, while proactively addressing any challenges that arise during environment deployment and management.
   

  

 Technology Tower: Storage and Backup
   

  

 Technology Used: Dell EMC Power Max storage, Cisco MDS Switch, NetApp Storage, Brocade Switch, Rubrik Backup (Optional)
   

  

 Role: Storage Administration and additionally backup management
   

  

 Skill Experience: 7\\+ relevant experience in Storage domain (preferably 1\\+ year of experience in backup technology as well)
   

  

 Total experience: 9\\-10 years
   

  

 Must Have Skills: Dell EMC Power\\-Max/Vmax storage, Cisco MDS switches
   

  

 Good To Have Skills: NetApp and Vmax Storage, VMware, Brocade Switch, Rubrik Backup Tool
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Storage and Backup administrative tasks \\-Regular Health checks, Troubleshooting, Lun creation and extension, Clean up tasks, Backup error troubleshooting
   

  

 Responsible for ensuring availability and improvement of performance of the Storage and Backup devices and maintenance of SLA using best practices.
   

  

 To proactively monitor the storage systems to ensure storage accessibility and zero data loss.
   

  

 Proactive incident and change Management.
   

  

 Generate storage reports as per requirement
   

  

 Analyze the activities assigned as required by the business.
   

  

 Technical Experience
   

  

* Storage Management \\& Administration:


 Manage, configure, and optimize Dell EMC Power\\-Max storage arrays including VMFS, vSAN, and storage provisioning.
   

  

 Configure and manage masking views, zoning, and LUN provisioning.
   

  

 Perform storage expansion, refresh activities, and SRDF\\-based replication.
   

  

 Monitor storage performance, capacity planning, and health status.
   

  

* Backup, Replication \\& Disaster Recovery:


 Implement and manage SRDF replication for disaster recovery.
   

  

 Create and restore snapshots, clones, and backups.
   

  

 Execute failover, failback, and DR testing procedures.
   

  

 Work closely with backup team to integrate storage solutions with backup policies.
   

  

* Troubleshooting \\& Optimization:


 Investigate and resolve storage performance issues.
   

  

 Troubleshoot hardware failures, disk replacements, and RAID\\-level configurations.
   

  

 Perform LUN cleanup, disk failure analysis, and recoverability testing.
   

  

 Collaborate with server, network, and security teams to ensure seamless storage integration.
   

  

* Required Skills \\& Qualifications:


 7\\+ years of experience in enterprise storage administration.
   

  

 Hands\\-on experience with Dell EMC PowerMax, Unisphere for PowerMax, and Symmetrix CLI (SYMCLI).
   

  

 Strong understanding of VMware vSphere storage (VMFS, NFS, vSAN, vVols).
   

  

 Knowledge of SRDF, SnapVX, TimeFinder, and replication technologies.
   

  

 Experience with zoning on Cisco/Brocade SAN switches.
   

  

 Proficiency in RAID levels, storage tiering, and capacity management.
   

  

 Familiarity with backup solutions like Rubrik or Commvault.
   

  

 Scripting knowledge for automation (PowerShell, Bash, Python).
   

  

 Experience working with Linux and Windows\\-based storage clients.
   

  

 Excellent problem\\-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.
   

  

 Professional Experience/Attribute
   

  

* Good communication skill
* Good team player with good interpersonal skill.
* Take part in 24x7 Shift Rotations including Morning, Evening and Night Shifts.
* Take part in weekend /holiday on call support Be flexible to learn new technology /skill
